summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment must obtain NCRTC (National Council for Radio Transmissions and Communications — المجلس القومي للإرسال الراديوي والاتصالات) type approval certificate before import or sale in Sudan. Submission requires a technical file and test reports from NCRTC-accredited or ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories. CE mark, FCC authorization, and CCC are not accepted as substitutes. Arabic-language documentation is commonly required for the application dossier.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备须在进口或于苏丹销售前取得NCRTC（المجلس القومي للإرسال الراديوي والاتصالات，国家无线电传输与通信委员会）型式核准证书。申请须提交技术文件及来自NCRTC认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告。CE标志、FCC授权及CCC不被接受为替代。申请文件通常需要阿拉伯语版本。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端裝置須在進口或於蘇丹銷售前取得NCRTC（المجلس القومي للإرسال الراديوي والاتصالات，國家無線電傳輸與通信委員會）型式核准證書。申請須提交技術文件及來自NCRTC認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告。CE標誌、FCC授權及CCC不被接受為替代。申請文件通常需要阿拉伯語版本。

standards_or_laws: NCRTC Type Approval Requirements for Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment
ILAC/MRA recognized laboratory test reports accepted
Arabic-language documentation required for application dossier

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for RF transmitters, MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment, and CCC for radio equipment modules in scope. Testing is performed to GB/T standards (GB/T 9254 for EMC, GB 4943.1 for safety). Neither SRRC nor CCC is recognised by NCRTC.
summary.zh: 中国对射频发射设备要求MIIT/SRRC无线电型号核准，对电信终端设备要求MIIT进网许可证（NAL），对适用范围内的无线设备模块要求CCC认证。测试依据GB/T标准（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943.1）。SRRC和CCC均不被NCRTC承认。
summary.zht: 中國對射頻發射裝置要求MIIT/SRRC無線電型號核准，對電信終端裝置要求MIIT進網許可證（NAL），對適用範圍內的無線設備模組要求CCC認證。測試依據GB/T標準（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943.1）。SRRC和CCC均不被NCRTC承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC Radio Type Approval (MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for applicable RF modules

gap.en: NCRTC type approval is an entirely separate certification from SRRC, CCC, CE mark, or FCC authorization. None of these are recognised by NCRTC. A fresh application with technical file and test reports from NCRTC-accredited or ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories is required. Arabic-language documentation is typically required for the dossier. COMESA membership does not provide a harmonized type approval shortcut.
gap.zh: NCRTC型式核准与SRRC、CCC、CE标志或FCC授权完全独立，NCRTC不承认上述任何认证。须提交全新申请，附技术文件及来自NCRTC认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告。申请文件通常需要阿拉伯语版本。COMESA成员资格不提供统一型式核准捷径。
gap.zht: NCRTC型式核准與SRRC、CCC、CE標誌或FCC授權完全獨立，NCRTC不承認上述任何認證。須提交全新申請，附技術文件及來自NCRTC認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告。申請文件通常需要阿拉伯語版本。COMESA成員資格不提供統一型式核准捷徑。

source.publisher: NCRTC — National Council for Radio Transmissions and Communications (Sudan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China SRRC approval, CCC, CE mark, and FCC authorization do not satisfy NCRTC type approval requirements. A separate NCRTC certification process with test reports from NCRTC-accredited or ILAC/MRA-recognized laboratories and Arabic-language documentation is required before any wireless or telecom terminal device may be imported or sold in Sudan. Verify current international sanctions status before proceeding with any export to Sudan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC批准、CCC、CE标志及FCC授权均不满足NCRTC型式核准要求。任何无线或电信终端设备在苏丹进口或销售前，须另行完成NCRTC认证流程，提供来自NCRTC认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告及阿拉伯语文件。在对苏丹出口前须核实当前国际制裁状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC批准、CCC、CE標誌及FCC授權均不滿足NCRTC型式核准要求。任何無線或電信終端裝置在蘇丹進口或銷售前，須另行完成NCRTC認證流程，提供來自NCRTC認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告及阿拉伯語文件。在對蘇丹出口前須核實當前國際制裁狀態。
